description: Information security management system requirements — Annex A control mappings to M365 assessment checks

A.5.1.title: Policies for information security
A.5.1.evidence: Conditional Access policies, password protection settings, authentication methods policy

A.8.2.title: Privileged access rights
A.8.2.evidence: Directory role assignments, PIM configuration, Global Admin count

A.8.3.title: Information access restriction
A.8.3.evidence: CA policies restricting access by location, device, risk level; app permission grants

A.8.5.title: Secure authentication
A.8.5.evidence: MFA enrollment rates, authentication methods enabled, password protection

A.5.15.title: Access control
A.5.15.evidence: CA policy coverage, role assignments, guest access controls

A.5.16.title: Identity management
A.5.16.evidence: User lifecycle management, stale account detection, app registration hygiene

A.5.17.title: Authentication information
A.5.17.evidence: MFA methods, password policies, FIDO2/passwordless status

A.5.18.title: Access rights
A.5.18.evidence: Role assignments, app permissions, guest account reviews

A.8.15.title: Logging
A.8.15.evidence: Sign-in logs, audit logs, risk detection events

A.8.16.title: Monitoring activities
A.8.16.evidence: Identity Protection alerts, Defender incidents, risky user detections

A.5.23.title: Information security for use of cloud services
A.5.23.evidence: Cloud app governance, OAuth consent policies, CASB configuration

A.5.24.title: Information security incident management planning and preparation
A.5.24.evidence: Incident response policies, alert configuration, automated response

A.6.1.title: Screening
A.6.1.evidence: Guest invitation policies, external collaboration settings

A.7.9.title: Security of assets off-premises
A.7.9.evidence: Device compliance policies, MAM policies, location-based CA

A.8.1.title: User endpoint devices
A.8.1.evidence: Device compliance, encryption status, OS update compliance

coverage_calculation: Number of controls with at least one passing check / total mapped controls × 100
